package.name: mas_coop_mock
package.description: Mock cooperative-sensing closed loop for the PN interception harness (RA-L ticket 019). Deterministic stand-ins for the RL cooperative-sensing CONTROL policy: a scripted viewing-offset observer driver, a constant-velocity smoother that adds target velocity to the fused pose (the PN drop-in gap), and a peer-communication (AoI) delay stage. Removable; the real sensing/fusion (mas_multiview + mas_tracker) is unchanged.
